svg.title: Event-based optical flow via time surface
svg.desc: Three-stage diagram: a pixel grid accumulates latest event timestamps into a time surface, a local plane is fitted to the surface around each active pixel, and the plane gradient gives the 2D velocity vector.
svg.text: plane fit: T ≈ ax + by + c

g.text: Event stream input: e = (x, y, t, p)
Only ON events used here (p = +1); OFF events processed symmetrically
Each event gives 1-DOF normal flow. Full 2-DOF velocity needs regularization
